title: Error::Transport display duplicates tpm_rc_name lookup (divergence risk)
description: wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs Error::Transport display has a hardcoded match arm for 3 wolfTPM error codes (TIMEOUT, BAD_FUNC_ARG, BAD_STATE_E). The same codes (and 3 more) are already in wolftpm_sys::tpm_rc::tpm_rc_name. If new wolfTPM error codes are added to tpm_rc.rs, the Transport display will silently show raw hex codes instead of symbolic names. Transport errors are the most common errors users will see. Fix: replace the inline match with a call to wolftpm_sys::tpm_rc::tpm_rc_name(*code as u32).
